chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 581 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on CMA 2419/23 3.For orders on CMA 2420/23 4.For hearing of main case. 20-03-2025 None present for the petitioners. ***** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing, which shows that petitioners and their counsel have lost their interest in proceeding of this matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution a/w listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
